generated_oml:
instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensors providing data for reinforcement learning-based control policy optimization in BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance SensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted from physical assets to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with domain semantics for Building Control Systems (BCS), providing a semantic backbone for spatial, geometric, and functional data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance LightingControl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting control in Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC components in Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for rich interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) tools for automated transformation of BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for operational analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects through reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data insights for facility management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for building performance analysis"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimizing energy consumption in building operations"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimizing visual comfort in building environments"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimizing non-visual health effects in building environments"
]

instance VisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure serving as a Living Lab for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation"
    base:contains PostOccupancySensor, LightingControl, HVACActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the digital twin to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, facilitating bidirectional communication for building automation and optimization of energy, comfort, and health effects."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework with modular, service-oriented architecture featuring standardized extension points for integrating custom services, facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from initial design to construction, operation, refurbishments, and adaptations, as stated in 'complete building life cycle, from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation' for AECO domain applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness, addressing semantic drift through synchronization techniques to ensure alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and digital twin, enabling real-time synchronization."
]
